name: Soda Cracker Pie
recipeIngredient: 16 Soda crackers, rolled into very fine crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Add baking powder to the egg whites and beat again.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating continuously.
4. Stir in vanilla.
5. Mix this batter with the cracker crumbs and chopped pecans.
6. Pour into a 9-inch greased pie pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely.
9. Top with sweetened whipped cream or whipped topping (cool whip).
